  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  Library for automatic morphological analysis of English,
  Russian and German Languages. Version 2.
  Finds the lemmas (all forms) of a word.
  Written in C++.
  
  WWW: http://www.aot.ru/
  - Andrei V. Shetuhin
  slonik-v-domene@mail.ru
  reki@reki.ru
